title: Godrej Properties is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Properties is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!
